home.headline: We work with few.
home.subheadline: We work with a select few clients — deeply, not broadly. No templates. No cookie-cutter sequences. Just precise, measurable outbound built around your business.

services.headline: One system. From 0 to booked calls.
services.subheadline: Not separate services — all pieces connect into one outbound machine that continuously books qualified meetings.
services.service1Desc: Precision cold email sequences that land and convert. Personalized, GDPR-compliant, and optimized for maximum deliverability.
services.service2Desc: From TAM analysis to a ready-to-use contact list. We identify and verify exactly the prospects that match your ICP.
services.service3Desc: Automatic enrichment with tech stack, buying signals, and firmographics — for maximum relevance in every message.
services.service4Desc: Multi-step workflows, trigger-based sequences, and CRM sync — your entire outbound runs on autopilot.
services.service5Desc: Intelligent agents that independently research, qualify, and personalize. Scalable 1:1 relevance without manual effort.

howItWorks.headline: A full pipeline in four steps
howItWorks.subheadline: Our proven process takes you from zero to an automated outbound engine — quickly and efficiently.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We get to know your business, target customers, and current sales process. Together we define clear goals and KPIs.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We build your custom outbound infrastructure: target lists, messaging frameworks, and technical automation flows.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The system goes live. We measure, test, and continuously optimize based on real data.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Once the pipeline is running, we scale deliberately — more contacts, new segments, higher conversion.

caseStudies.headline: Results that speak for themselves
caseStudies.subheadline: Real projects. Measurable results. Swiss quality.
caseStudies.case1Desc: Through a fully automated LinkedIn + email sequence, we tripled the demo pipeline in 8 weeks.
caseStudies.case2Desc: For a mid-sized consulting firm, we built a complete outbound engine — from ICP definition to booked demo.
caseStudies.case3Desc: With a precise targeting strategy and automated follow-ups, we established a scalable outbound process.

about.headline: Behind the wave.
about.subheadline: Swellsystems was founded with a clear mission: to help B2B companies in Switzerland and Germany win qualified leads systematically and at scale.
about.founderBio: I have worked with many different agencies. The experience was almost always the same: you're just a number. Standard solutions, little genuine interest, and barely any measurable results. That's what led me to found Swellsystems. I'm not looking for a large number of clients — I'm looking for real partnerships with companies I truly know and for whom I deliver concrete, measurable results.
about.value1Desc: No mass emails. Every message is relevant and tailored to the recipient.
about.value2Desc: Clear reporting, honest communication, and measurable results — always.
about.value3Desc: We work deeply with selected clients rather than superficially with many.

contact.headline: Ready to fill your pipeline?
contact.subheadline: Book a free 30-minute call. We'll analyze your current situation and show you what automated outbound could look like for your business.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What's currently your biggest sales challenge?
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Automated outbound for ambitious B2B companies.
